options.content:
PHENOHIVE

● SYSTEMS ACTIVE ● DATA SYNC: ON
To Export: Panel Menu (...) → Inspect → Data → Download CSV VIEW DATASET

targets.query:
from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sht35_air_temperature_c")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sht35_air_temperature_c_stddev")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "stddev")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sht35_air_humidity_pct")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sht35_air_humidity_pct_stddev")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "stddev")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vision_growth_px")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "scale_hx711_weight_g")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "scale_hx711_weight_g_stddev")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "stddev")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_lux" or r._field == "tcs3448_red" or r._field == "tcs3448_green" or r._field == "tcs3448_blue")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_lux_stddev")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "lux_stddev")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_fxl")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_nir")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_2x_vis_1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_fd_1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sht35_sample_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value: float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0 }))
  |> yield(name: "age_s")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tcs3448_lux")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /_quality_score$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "phenohive")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "phenohive_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.station_id == "01")
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "station_id"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> sort(columns:["_time"], desc:true)
  |> limit(n: 5000)
